subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Him Who hath sent down the Book in truth and made it a testimony from His presence unto all the worlds. Verily, it is the Lamp of Guidance manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الکتاب بالحق و جعله برهانا من عنده علی العالمین انه لمصباح الهدی بین
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
